incidents.title: API Latency Degradation
incidents.impact: Some users experienced increased API response times (2-3x normal)
incidents.root_cause: Database connection pool saturation during traffic spike

updates.message: We are investigating reports of increased API latency.
The issue has been identified as database connection pool saturation. Working on mitigation.
Connection pool size increased. Monitoring for stability.
Issue resolved. All systems operating normally.

incidents.title: Scheduled Maintenance - Database Migration
incidents.impact: Brief read-only mode during migration window
incidents.root_cause: Planned maintenance for database schema updates

updates.message: Starting scheduled maintenance. Database entering read-only mode.
Migration completed successfully. Verifying data integrity.
Maintenance completed. All systems back to normal operation.

incidents.title: Authentication Service Partial Outage
incidents.impact: Some users unable to log in or authenticate API requests
incidents.root_cause: OAuth provider rate limiting triggered by unusual traffic pattern

updates.message: We are aware of authentication issues affecting some users.
Issue traced to OAuth provider rate limiting. Implementing fallback.
Fallback authentication enabled. Monitoring login success rates.
Authentication fully restored. Implementing permanent rate limit handling.

incidents.title: Search Index Rebuild
incidents.impact: Search results may have been slightly stale during rebuild

incidents.title: CDN Cache Invalidation Issue
incidents.impact: Some users seeing stale dashboard content
incidents.root_cause: CDN cache invalidation job failed silently

updates.message: Investigating reports of stale content in dashboard.
CDN cache invalidation issue identified. Manually purging cache.
Cache purged. Adding monitoring for cache invalidation jobs.
